perceptual_narrative_logs.visual_narrative_log: (1) A young woman with long dark hair stands in front of Costco meat display cases, holding a small plate with a food sample. Large text hooks are overlaid on the screen. (2) Hands reach into the frame multiple times to offer her larger-than-usual food samples including cakes and salad buns. The woman looks surprised and delighted as she receives them. (3) She shows multiple plates of samples simultaneously towards the camera, smiling while more text appears concluding the tip.
perceptual_narrative_logs.audio_narrative_log: (1) Upbeat, medium-tempo electronic background music starts immediately. A young woman's voice (Dora) introduces herself and excitedly talks about the 'correct time' to visit Costco. (2) The sound of a busy supermarket environment with distant chatter is audible under the narration. The speaker continues describing the large portions of free samples available. (3) The music continues at a steady pace as the speaker delivers the final punchline about the specific time to visit, ending with an energetic tone.
perceptual_narrative_logs.text_narrative_log: (1) '逛好市多的正確時間' (Correct time to visit Costco) - Hook text, informative. (2) '吃不完的試吃!!!' (Endless samples!!!) - Decorative text, enthusiastic tone. (3) '大家好我是Dora' (Hi everyone, I'm Dora) - Functional text, self-introduction. (4) Functional subtitles are present throughout, translating the speaker's Mandarin narration into Traditional Chinese text.

temporal_pacing_summary.mainActionFlow: Hook -> Demo of food samples -> Conclusion/Secret reveal

visual_human_presence.countingEvidence: 1 main female creator, 1 female passer-by in background, 1 person (likely male based on watch) whose hands are visible giving out samples.
visual_human_presence.mainCharacterDescription: A young woman with long black hair wearing a brown puffer-style jacket with a faux-fur collar.

visual_scene_and_style.backgroundDescribe: A typical Costco warehouse interior with refrigerated shelving units containing packaged meat and bakery products.

narrative_and_purpose.mainPurpose: To share a lifestyle 'hack' or tip for Costco shoppers, demonstrating that visiting near closing time results in significantly larger free food samples. The video uses the creator's surprise and the physical evidence of the food to validate the tip.

endorsement_analysis.endorsementCues: The video is presented as a personal tip/vlog rather than a formal sponsorship.

social_sociology_tags.freeDescribe: Typical short-form social media formatting with high-contrast text overlays and fast-paced editing to maximize engagement.
